stemHtml: Which of the following is correct concerning the use of medications containing melatonin?

options.a: May be used just before the duty rest period in flight.
options.b: Melatonin should not be used approximately 12 hours before and during the duty period.
options.c: Can be used if allowed by the commander to assist in micro-sleeps.
options.d: It is safe to fly as long as the medication was taken at least 8 hours before the flight.
